MASTER SERVICES AGREEMENT

between NimbusPay ("Vendor") and Customer Corp. ("Customer")
Effective Date: June 1, 2024

1. TERM
1.1 [Reserved]
2. INITIAL TERM
2.1 This Agreement has an initial term of thirty-six (36) months and shall
not automatically renew; renewal requires a signed written amendment.

3. SERVICES
3.1 Vendor shall process Customer's payroll through the Nimbus payroll
platform, including tax withholding, filing, and direct deposit.

4. CUSTOMER OBLIGATIONS
4.1 Customer shall maintain accurate employee headcount records within the
Nimbus platform.

5. FEES AND PAYMENT
5.1 Customer shall pay $8.00 per active employee per month, processed
through the Nimbus payroll platform.
5.2 In addition to per-employee fees, Customer shall pay a platform base
fee of $300.00 per month.
5.3 Invoices are issued monthly and due within thirty (30) days.
5.4 Mid-cycle employee count changes shall be prorated daily.

6. COMPLIANCE
6.1 Vendor shall remain current on all applicable federal and state
payroll tax filing requirements on Customer's behalf.

7. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY
7.1 Neither party's aggregate liability under this Agreement shall exceed
the fees paid by Customer in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim.

8. GOVERNING LAW
8.1 This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of Texas.
